title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV.  UNIFORM CHILD CUSTODY JURISDICTION

AND ENFORCEMENT ACT

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§1801.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the Uniform Child Custody Jurisdiction and Enforcement Act.

Acts 2006, No. 822, §1, eff. Aug. 15, 2007.
